subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-05-09 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: When you converse with those who are not religious, alert them to the detriments and corruptive influences of the world of nature
subcodes.first_line_orig: وقتی با بیدینها صحبت میکنید از مضرات و مفاسد عالم طبیعت آنها را آگاه نمائید
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @light and darkness, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
